🐦 X For You — Benchmark Dashboard

Criterion benchmarks for the scoring, pipeline, and Thunder hot paths · Tracks regressions >10%

Interactive chart of all tracked benchmarks across every CI run. Spot regressions at a glance.

Run history, step summaries, and artifact downloads (Criterion HTML reports).

Source Repository
Benchmark harness, lib mirrors, and the README describing the full algorithm architecture.
📐
mid-math (SIMD)
The math library targeted for SIMD optimisation of scoring hot paths. f32x4, Vec3x4, SSE2.
Benchmark History — All Runs
⏳ Benchmark history loads from dev/bench/index.html after the first CI run pushes data.

mid-math SIMD Opportunity Map
Hot Path File Current Pattern mid-math Approach Expected Gain Priority
compute_weighted_score scoring_bench.rs 22 scalar mul + add Pack scores→[f32;24], 6× f32x4 mul + hsum = dot product 3–5× P1
offset_score (batch) scoring_bench.rs branch per candidate on sign f32x4::blend for branchless ternary across 4 candidates ~2× P1
diversity_multiplier (powf) scoring_bench.rs decay.powf(position as f64) per candidate Precompute [f64;64] table, index by position; final mul via f32x4 4–8× P2
bloom may_contain pipeline_bench.rs scalar hash loop × num_hashes Unroll 4 hashes with u32x4 multiply + bit-extract 2–3× P2
score_recent sort thunder_bench.rs sort_unstable_by_key on created_at: i64 SIMD-friendly radix sort pass using i32x4 comparisons on upper 32 bits 1.5–2× P3
full_pipeline batch score scoring_bench.rs sequential scalar loop over 2000 candidates Process 4 candidates simultaneously via SoA PhoenixScores → Vec3x4 pattern 3–4× P2
Algorithm Pipeline (reference)
Thunder (in-network) ──┐
                        ├──► Hydrate ──► Filter ──► Phoenix Scorer ──► Weighted Scorer ──► Diversity Scorer ──► Sort ──► Top-K
Phoenix Retrieval ─────┘
                               │               │              │                   │                   │
                               │         HashSet/Bloom      ML predictions     22× mul-add         powf decay
                               │         lookups            (cached)           ← SIMD P1 →        ← SIMD P2 →
                        DashMap
                        double-lookup
                        ← bottleneck →
X For You Bench · MidManStudio · Apache 2.0 · Benchmark History · mid-math
